title: Missouri ex rel. Gaines v. Canada

sources.source_title: Missouri ex rel. Gaines v. Canada
sources.notes: Case summary explaining that states providing legal education to white students could not satisfy equal protection by sending Black students out of state instead of admitting them to an in-state law school.

sources.source_title: Missouri ex rel. Gaines v. Canada
sources.notes: Full opinion page for the 1938 ruling requiring Missouri to provide substantially equal in-state legal education.

sources.source_title: Timeline of Events Leading to Brown v. Board of Education
sources.notes: National Archives timeline placing Gaines among the major legal steps that built toward Brown v. Board of Education.

title: Alexander v. Holmes County Board of Education

sources.source_title: Alexander v. Holmes County Board of Education
sources.notes: Opinion page for the 1969 ruling ordering school districts to terminate dual school systems immediately.

sources.source_title: Timeline of Events Leading to Brown v. Board of Education
sources.notes: National Archives timeline connecting Brown to later enforcement cases including Alexander.

sources.source_title: School Desegregation and Equal Educational Opportunity
sources.notes: Research context on enforcement-era desegregation and the legal push to move from delay to immediate compliance.

title: Swann v. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Board of Education

sources.source_title: Swann v. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Board of Education
sources.notes: Opinion page for the 1971 decision approving broad federal court remedies, including busing, to dismantle segregated school systems.

sources.source_title: Timeline of Events Leading to Brown v. Board of Education
sources.notes: National Archives timeline showing Swann as a major post-Brown desegregation enforcement case.

sources.source_title: Brown at 70: The Ongoing Struggle for School Desegregation
sources.notes: Brookings overview discussing the continuing relevance of Swann and later limits on desegregation.

sources.source_title: Milliken v. Bradley
sources.notes: Opinion page for the 1974 ruling limiting interdistrict desegregation remedies absent proof that multiple districts had deliberately discriminated.

sources.source_title: Brown at 70: The Ongoing Struggle for School Desegregation
sources.notes: Brookings analysis describing Milliken as a major constraint on metropolitan desegregation efforts.

sources.source_title: School Desegregation and Equal Educational Opportunity
sources.notes: Research context on the role of Milliken in limiting the reach of school desegregation remedies.

title: Regents of the University of California v. Bakke

sources.source_title: Regents of the University of California v. Bakke
sources.notes: Opinion page for the 1978 decision that struck down rigid racial quotas while allowing race to be considered as one factor in admissions.

sources.source_title: Regents of the University of California v. Bakke, 438 U.S. 265 (1978)
sources.notes: Official United States Reports PDF.

sources.source_title: Affirmative Action Fast Facts
sources.notes: Background summary explaining Bakke's role in shaping later affirmative action doctrine.

sources.source_title: Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard/UNC Resources
sources.notes: Academic explainer placing Bakke within the longer line of affirmative action jurisprudence.

sources.source_title: Grutter v. Bollinger
sources.notes: Opinion page for the 2003 decision upholding limited use of race in higher education admissions to further diversity.

sources.source_title: Grutter v. Bollinger, 539 U.S. 306 (2003)
sources.notes: Official United States Reports PDF.

sources.source_title: The Compelling Need for Diversity in Higher Education
sources.notes: Legal commentary summarizing Grutter's significance before the 2023 rollback.

sources.source_title: Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard/UNC Resources
sources.notes: Academic explainer linking Grutter to later affirmative action litigation.

title: Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard and UNC

sources.source_title: Students for Fair Admissions, Inc. v. President and Fellows of Harvard College
sources.notes: Opinion page for the 2023 ruling sharply limiting race-conscious admissions in higher education.

sources.source_title: Students for Fair Admissions, Inc. v. President and Fellows of Harvard College / UNC
sources.publisher: Supreme Court of the United States
sources.notes: Official Supreme Court slip opinion PDF.

sources.source_title: Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard/UNC Resources
sources.notes: Academic explainer describing how the decision reworked affirmative action doctrine.

sources.source_title: The Supreme Court Restricts the Use of Race in College Admissions
sources.notes: Policy analysis summarizing the practical effect of the decision on higher education admissions.

sources.source_title: Students for Fair Admissions, Inc. v. President and Fellows of Harvard College
sources.notes: First Circuit opinion showing how the Harvard challenge was analyzed through the Bakke, Grutter, Gratz, and Fisher doctrine line before the Supreme Court reversal.
